'''magofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mica|mica]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mica|mica]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| magofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægefeth|mægefeth]] || [[word:mægefej|mægefej]] || [[word:mægefesh|mægefesh]] || [[word:mægefe|mægefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:magogofoth|magogofoth]] || [[word:magogofoj|magogofoj]] || [[word:magogofosh|magogofosh]] || [[word:magogofo|magogofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:magofoth|magofoth]] || [[word:magofoj|magofoj]] || [[word:magofosh|magofosh]] || [[word:magofo|magofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:magoffofth|magoffofth]] || [[word:magoffofj|magoffofj]] || [[word:magoffofsh|magoffofsh]] || [[word:magoffof|magoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:magofotho|magofotho]] || [[word:magofojo|magofojo]] || [[word:magofosho|magofosho]] || [[word:magofoko|magofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:magofoth|magofoth]] || [[word:magofoj|magofoj]] || [[word:magofosh|magofosh]] || [[word:magofo|magofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:magofothol|magofothol]] || [[word:magofojol|magofojol]] || [[word:magofoshol|magofoshol]] || [[word:magofokol|magofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:magofoothotho|magofoothotho]] || [[word:magofoojojo|magofoojojo]] || [[word:magofooshosho|magofooshosho]] || [[word:magofooko|magofooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:magofothon|magofothon]] || [[word:magofojon|magofojon]] || [[word:magofoshon|magofoshon]] || [[word:magofokon|magofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:magofothooro|magofothooro]] || [[word:magofojooro|magofojooro]] || [[word:magofoshooro|magofoshooro]] || [[word:magofokooro|magofokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
